message:
refactor(io): use io::Error::other() shorthand in completion guards

Replace verbose io::Error::new(io::ErrorKind::Other, msg) with the
equivalent io::Error::other(msg) convenience method in Copy, CopyBuf,
CopyWithProgress, CopyBidirectional, and ReadLine completion guards.
No behavioral change — same error kind and message.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
